prompts: Cinematic wide shot in a Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood interior. Yuna Moonvale, an androgynous ranger with a green half-cape and leaf-shaped brooch, steadies a dented shield on a workbench. Beside her, Yuna Silverbrook, an androgynous guild coordinator in a formal cloak, carefully guides a safe repair tool along the shield's edge. Cooperative hands, soft forge light, steady focus, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous forge shot, consistent lighting and character positioning. Yuna Silverbrook gently taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield while Yuna Moonvale maintains a firm, steady grip on the shield's handle. Friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, warm atmosphere, no text, no watermark.
